one_line_summary: Exemplary end-to-end delivery: ADR-first, real CLI+REPL wiring, reuses Engine/agents, 19 targeted tests, coherent docs, no commits.
strengths: ADR-076 written first with clear Driver/Navigator contract, alternatives, and acceptance criteria
Real wiring: duh tdd subcommand, /tdd slash, REPL lifecycle signal, all reusing Engine + AGENT_OVERLAYS
Tests cover all six phase transitions, RED/GREEN gate inversion, refactor-verbatim contract, and end-to-end stub run
weaknesses: Minor method/property naming churn (spec→draft_spec) suggests late API refactor
REPL /tdd path is less exercised by tests than the CLI path
Some duplication between README section and wiki page
